name: clockify-ts-sdk-workspace
description: npm workspaces root for clockify-sdk-ts-115 (SDK), @apet97/clockify-cli-115, and @apet97/clockify-mcp-115. Published to npm under the unofficial @apet97 scope.

scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w clockify-sdk-ts-115 && npm run type-check -w @apet97/clockify-cli-115 && npm run type-check -w @apet97/clockify-mcp-115
scripts.build: npm run build -w clockify-sdk-ts-115 && npm run build -w @apet97/clockify-cli-115 && npm run build -w @apet97/clockify-mcp-115
scripts.test: npm test -w clockify-sdk-ts-115 && npm test -w @apet97/clockify-cli-115 && npm test -w @apet97/clockify-mcp-115
